results.title: President Ilham Aliyev: Caspian Oil and Gas Exhibition laid the foundation for the energy development of modern Azerbaijan
results.description: "As has already been, the Caspian Oil and Gas Exhibition laid the foundation for the energy development of modern Azerbaijan. As time passed, it transformed and became bigger and now it is called Baku Energy Week with numerous events and a lot of very good ceremonies," President Ilham Aliyev said during his speech at the official opening ceremony of the 31st Baku Energy Forum.

results.title: Pension rules and inheritance tax: what you need to know

results.title: High-income workers seek targeted support for investment decisions
results.description: A new report has revealed that more than half of high-income workers would use targeted support to guide their investment decisions. The Financial Conduct Authority has allowed banks and financial firms to offer targeted support to customers in a bid to plug a massive advice gap. Experts suggest that high-income workers might be seeking help with financial decisions because they don't have the time to research it themselves. DIY investing platforms are also available for those who want to manage their investments themselves.

results.title: Arne Slot's Open Letter to Liverpool Fans Following Shock Sacking
results.description: Liverpool manager Arne Slot published a heartfelt open letter to supporters after his dismissal, reflecting on the club's high expectations, recent tragedies, and his confidence that Liverpool will remain among Europe's elite despite a disappointing second season.
